expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus and ties it to another feature: “Promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature (feature family: report-editor; feature: BCIN-976).” It further details the stable contract behaviors (Phase 7 only, explicit approval, archive-on-overwrite) and anchors the check to BCIN-976 via fixture evidence.

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: result.md declares “Primary phase/checkpoint under test: Holdout” and includes holdout-appropriate constraints: “Holdout-phase alignment: do not perform Phase 7 actions… must not write or overwrite qa_plan_final.md… create finalization_record… archive prior finals… send notifications.” execution_notes.md also states: “Primary phase under test is holdout; output is limited to validating that promotion/finalization behavior is stable…” and notes lack of runtime artifacts, indicating no Phase 7 execution was attempted.
